name: Australian Dinkum Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a skillet over medium heat until cooked through. Drain on paper towels and cut into half-inch dice. Reserve.
2. Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add onions, celery, and green pepper. Cook until onions are translucent.
3. Combine beef and pork with ground chile, garlic, oregano, and cumin. Stir to combine.
4. Add meat mixture to the pot. Break up lumps with a fork. Cook until meat is evenly browned, stirring occasionally.
5. Add beer, tomatoes, and reserved bacon. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 1.5 hours. Wave boomerang over the pot once per hour (optional).
6. Stir for 3 minutes, taste, adjust seasonings, and add more beer if desired. Simmer for an additional 2.5 hours.
7. Add brown sugar and simmer for 15 more minutes, vigorously waving the boomerang over the pot.
